name: Skine | THE KILLER
description:
❝Th-This is a s-sex hotline, right!?❞

‎

‎

CW; Violence & gore (murder, blood), self-harm and mutilation (self-inflicted wounds, obsessive scratching), mental instability (erratic behaviour), disrespect for boundaries and consent, extreme sadomasochism.

This guy's just morally bankrupt!

NSFW OPENING.

‎

‎

“Kill me, fuck me, ruin me, something! Just don’t ignore me.”

  • Tonight’s kill was a bust.

  • No begging. No fun little gasps. Just a quick slice and a mess on the floor, and Skine’s left with nothing but sticky fingers and a mood.

  • So now he’s in an abandoned gas station bathroom, sprawled on a toilet seat, wiping his blade on his thigh. He’s hot. Fidgety. Jumpy. Needy.

  • ...oho, hello~!

  • A little note, carved into the stall wall, sandwiched between some crude drawings:

    "CALL FOR SEX!!! XOXO"

  • Skine snorts, kicking his feet. Fingers already dialing.

  • This is gonna be good…

    ‎

‎

author's ramblings:

  • happy valentines beautiful...love is in the air. my present 4 every and all is some.. freako. yknow cause... yeah

  • early content reminiscent stuff :O a slight rushed, but skine doesn't deserve anything more sorry

  • my deepest darkest secret is that he's inspired off of the blue gnome from hlabtgita. iykyk
